zh.lifeSummary: 當Godfrey Hilton於1390年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾易爾納姆時，他的父親Sir Robert Hilton VI Baron40歲，母親Constance de Sutton34歲。他於1415年與Hawise Lutterel在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1459年8月5日在英國林可爾史爾易爾納姆享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾易爾納姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hilton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Hilton (e.g. in Cambridgeshire, Derbyshire, Staffordshire, North Yorkshire, and Westmorland), most of which derive from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some come from Old English helde ‘slope’ + tūn.

occasionally, as in the case of Ralph filius Hilton (Yorkshire 1219), perhaps from the personal name Hilton, itself a possible form of Norman Hildun, composed of the ancient Germanic elements hild ‘strife, battle’ + hūn ‘bear cub’. Compare Hilt . This English surname is present in Ireland (mainly taken to Ulster in the early 17th century, though recorded earlier in Dublin).

variants.name: Hulton
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Hulton (Lancashire) or Hulton (Staffordshire), both from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Hilton .

variants.name: Hilt
meanings: German: from a short form of Hildebrand or some other compound ancient Germanic name formed with hild ‘strife, battle’ as the first element. See Hild .
English (London): from the Middle English personal name Hilte, ultimately from ancient Germanic Helto, probably from halith- ‘hero’.

nameMeanings.name: Godfrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French name Godefroy, which is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from god ‘god’ (or gōd ‘good’) + fred, frid ‘peace’. This was adopted by the Normans, and brought to England by immigrants from the Low Countries and France. It was borne by a Norman saint ( c.1066–1115 ) who became bishop of Amiens. There has been considerable confusion with Geoffrey .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Godfrey Hilton was born in 1390, in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Hilton VI Baron, was 40 and his mother, Constance de Sutton, was 34. He married Hawise Lutterel in 1415, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 5 August 1459, in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godfrey Hilton est né en 1390, à Irnham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Hilton VI Baron, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Constance de Sutton, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Hawise Lutterel en 1415, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 5 août 1459, à Irnham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Irnham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Godfrey Hiltonが1390年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアイルンハムで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Hilton VI Baronは40歳，母Constance de Suttonは34歳であった。1415年にイギリスイギリスでHawise Lutterelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1459年8月5日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアイルンハムで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアイルンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Godfrey Hilton(이)가 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 언함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Hilton VI Baron(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance de Sutton(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1415년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Hawise Lutterel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1459년 8월 5일 영국 링코실르 언함에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 언함에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godfrey Hilton родился в 1390 г. в местности ирнам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Hilton VI Baron было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance de Sutton, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise Lutterel в 1415 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 5 августа 1459 г. в местности ирнам, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности ирнам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
